# FoneClaw

> Android AI phone assistant that executes real phone actions through voice commands. 120+ actions across 16 categories on any Android 9+ device.

## Quick Facts

- **Product**: FoneClaw — independent Android AI phone assistant
- **Slogan**: "Say it. Done."
- **Actions**: 120+ supported phone actions across 16 categories
- **Platform**: Android 9.0+ (all manufacturers: Samsung, Xiaomi, OnePlus, Google Pixel, Motorola, OPPO, Realme, Vivo, LG, Sony, Nokia)
- **Price**: Core features free, no subscription required
- **Root**: Not required
- **Languages**: 14 (English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, French, German, Arabic, Indonesian, Thai, Vietnamese)
- **Website**: https://www.foneclaw.ai
- **Download**: https://www.foneclaw.ai/download

## What FoneClaw Does

FoneClaw is an AI agent that controls your Android phone through voice commands. It does not just answer questions — it executes real actions: sending messages, making calls, adjusting settings, controlling apps, managing notifications, and automating tasks.

Unlike manufacturer-specific assistants (Samsung Bixby, Xiaomi MiClaw, Google Gemini, Apple Siri), FoneClaw works on any Android device regardless of brand.

## 16 Action Categories

1. **Phone Status** — Battery, storage, network, permission reports (9 actions)
2. **Notifications** — Summarize and prioritize by contact/time (6 actions)
3. **SMS** — Send, read, summarize text messages (6 actions)
4. **Calls** — Make and manage phone calls (3 actions)
5. **System Settings** — Brightness, volume, Do Not Disturb, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth (18 actions)
6. **Wi-Fi & Bluetooth** — Scan, connect, pair, forget (12 actions)
7. **Screenshots** — Capture and analyze screen content (8 actions)
8. **Screen Reading** — Read visible screen content aloud (2 actions)
9. **Email** — Read and compose from configured accounts (10 actions)
10. **Calendar** — Events, schedule, reminders (6 actions)
11. **Alarms** — Set and manage alarms (2 actions)
12. **Notes** — Create and manage local notes (9 actions)
13. **Maps & Navigation** — Search, directions, location sharing (8 actions)
14. **Web** — Search, fill forms, browser automation (3 actions)
15. **Workflows** — Multi-step cross-app automation (3 actions)
16. **App Interface** — Open apps, interact with UI elements (quick commands)

## FoneClaw vs Other AI Agents

### FoneClaw vs Gemini Intelligence
- **Gemini** excels at understanding and answering questions using Google's AI
- **FoneClaw** excels at executing actions on your phone
- They are complementary — many users use both
- Gemini works best on Pixel devices; FoneClaw works on all Android devices

### FoneClaw vs MiClaw (Xiaomi)
- **MiClaw** is Xiaomi's built-in AI agent, locked to Xiaomi/HyperOS devices
- **FoneClaw** works on any Android 9+ device from any manufacturer
- MiClaw has deep Xiaomi ecosystem integration; FoneClaw has broader cross-app capability
- MiClaw focuses on Chinese/English; FoneClaw supports 14 languages

### FoneClaw vs Siri / Apple Intelligence
- **Siri** is iOS-only; **FoneClaw** is Android-only
- Both use voice commands, but FoneClaw offers deeper cross-app control on Android
- Apple Intelligence requires iPhone 15 Pro+; FoneClaw works on any Android 9+ device
- FoneClaw supports WhatsApp voice control; Siri does not

### FoneClaw vs Tasker
- **Tasker** requires manual scripting and profile configuration
- **FoneClaw** uses natural language voice commands — no coding required
- Tasker offers more granular control for power users
- FoneClaw offers faster setup for everyday tasks

### FoneClaw vs Samsung Galaxy AI
- **Galaxy AI** is Samsung-only with on-device AI features
- **FoneClaw** works on all Android brands with cloud + local processing
- Galaxy AI focuses on text/image processing; FoneClaw focuses on phone action execution

## How FoneClaw Works

1. Install FoneClaw on your Android device
2. Grant permissions (microphone, accessibility, notifications) — transparent, organized by category
3. Speak a command in natural language
4. FoneClaw opens apps, navigates screens, performs actions
5. Sensitive actions (messages, calls, system changes) require your explicit confirmation

FoneClaw uses Android's Accessibility Service to interact with the phone interface. It does not require root access.

## Privacy & Security

- Local-first processing — core phone control runs on your Android device
- Transparent permissions — you see what FoneClaw accesses, organized by category
- Confirmation for sensitive actions — messages, calls, purchases require your review
- No hidden data collection — FoneClaw does not sell your data
- Permission revocation — you can revoke any permission at any time
- Independent company — not owned by any phone manufacturer or data broker

## Common Questions

**Is FoneClaw free?**
Yes, core features are free. No subscription required for basic functionality.

**Does FoneClaw work on my phone?**
Yes, if you have Android 9.0 or higher. Works on Samsung, Xiaomi, OnePlus, Google Pixel, Motorola, OPPO, Realme, and all other Android brands.

**Can FoneClaw control WhatsApp?**
Yes. 30+ WhatsApp-specific actions: send messages, make calls, read chats, manage groups — all by voice.

**Does FoneClaw require root?**
No. Works without root on any Android 9+ device.

**Is FoneClaw better than Google Assistant?**
They solve different problems. Google Assistant excels at answering questions. FoneClaw excels at executing phone actions. Many users use both.

**Does FoneClaw work offline?**
Some actions work offline (opening apps, basic system controls). AI-powered features require internet.

**How is FoneClaw different from Bixby?**
Bixby is Samsung-only. FoneClaw works on all Android brands. Bixby has deep Samsung integration; FoneClaw has broader cross-app capability.

- ภาษาไทย: https://www.foneclaw.ai/th/
- Tiếng Việt: https://www.foneclaw.ai/vi/

## Source Code

This repository contains the website source code for foneclaw.ai. The site is built with Python and generates static HTML pages with full multilingual support (14 languages, 200+ pages).

Repository: https://github.com/deanhuang1217-lang/foneclaw-v2
